reviews.comment:
Flojita la estación de servicio. Los baños una mugre infernal, no está a la altura de una estación de servicio que recibe a una gran cantidad de clientes.

(Translated by Google)
The service station is terrible. The bathrooms are filthy; it's not up to the standard of a service station that receives a large number of customers.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURfNEp6bVJnEAE

reviews.comment:
Malísima la atención súper lenta. Y para completar me cobraron 2 veces , cuando llamé para pedir q me reintegren me respondieron de mala manera y obvio no me devolvieron mí dinero, volví a llamar y ya no me contestan

(Translated by Google)
The service was terrible, incredibly slow. And to top it all off, they charged me twice. When I called to ask for a refund, they were rude and, of course, didn't give me my money back. I called again, and now they're not answering.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNfdnM2d3FRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Los baños no muy limpios.

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms were not very clean.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNfOHR1b1VnEAE

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) Simple snack bar with few food options: only sandwiches and processed foods. But it has a decent espresso. The bathrooms are neglected; there was toilet paper, but it needed cleaning.

(Original)
Lanchonete simples, com poucas opções de comida: só sanduiches e industrialuzados. Mas tem um café expresso rasoável. Banheiros descuidados, tinha papel, mas precisava de uma limpeza.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNfa29EWGZnEAE

reviews.comment:
Baños sucios, sin agua.en época turistica. Falta de limpieza.

(Translated by Google)
Dirty bathrooms, no water, especially during tourist season. Lack of cleanliness.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNfX00yQ2hBRRAB

reviews.comment:
De todos los surtidores, funcionaba una sola bomba. El técnico llegó para hacer ajustes por el incremento del combustible al día siguiente, no para arreglar algún surtidor. Largas colas.

(Translated by Google)
Of all the pumps, only one was working. The technician arrived to make adjustments due to the fuel price increase the following day, not to repair any pumps. Long lines.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURmNmZlSVlREAE

reviews.comment:
Las piedras de la entrada son muy peligrosas para las motos , el lugar aveces no tiene nafta y no hay otro cerca, en un lugar estratégico no debería faltar el combustible nunca.

(Translated by Google)
The stones at the entrance are very dangerous for motorcycles; the place sometimes runs out of gas and there's no other gas station nearby; in a strategic location, fuel should never be lacking.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNmNmN2V0tBEAE

reviews.comment:
Una sola fila de autos para cargar nafta y en contra mano de como veníamos y pretendían qué demos vuelta y nos pongamos uno atrás de otro hacia la ruta .. muyyy brutos!

(Translated by Google)
There was only one line of cars waiting to get gas, facing the opposite direction from where we were coming, and they expected us to turn around and line up one behind the other towards the highway... so rude!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURmOE9UWHhRRRAB

reviews.comment:
El baño más sucio de todo Corrientes, jamás hay papel y siempre tiene mal olor

(Translated by Google)
The dirtiest bathroom in all of Corrientes, there's never any toilet paper and it always smells bad
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNmeHM2NFl3EAE

reviews.comment:
Buen punto de encuentro, buena atención

(Translated by Google)
Good meeting point, good service
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR2cE1qdmhBRRAB

reviews.comment:
buena atención, baños limpios, servicio gratuito de agua caliente, shop de café y comidas muy completo. Recomendable.

(Translated by Google)
Good service, clean restrooms, free hot water, and a well-stocked coffee and food shop. Highly recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN2ajZEb3dBRRAB
